title: Social Video Downloader Input
description: Provide video URLs from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X (Twitter), or Facebook.

urls.title: Video URLs
urls.description: List of video URLs to extract. Supports YouTube (youtube.com/watch, youtu.be), TikTok (tiktok.com/@user/video), Instagram (instagram.com/p/, /reel/), X/Twitter (twitter.com/i/status, x.com/i/status), Facebook (facebook.com/video).

includeSubtitles.title: Include Subtitles / Captions
includeSubtitles.description: When enabled, attempts to extract available subtitle tracks and caption data for YouTube videos.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify Proxy configuration for geo-restricted or rate-limited content.
